reviews.comment:
Excelente espacio para maniobrar dentro de la estación y entre surtidores.
Muy buena atención y limpieza.
Y no suele haber muchos gente.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent maneuvering space inside the station and between pumps.
Very good service and cleanliness.
And it's not usually crowded.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3N002YlpnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy amables y servicios completos. Una pena que el combustible siga subiendo. No hay nada mejor que viajar y, en el viaje, un ACA a la vista es la seguridad.

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly and comprehensive service. It's a shame fuel prices keep rising. There's nothing better than traveling, and when you're traveling, an ACA in sight is a sign of safety.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBeE9LZWFBEAE

reviews.comment:
No quisieron vendernos nada x q estaban en 20 minutos y en la playa no nos dejó estacionar

(Translated by Google)
They refused to sell us anything because they were 20 minutes away, and they wouldn't let us park on the beach.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBM00tMUFREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención en los surtidores. Despues de hacer la cola  me derivaron a otro surtidor que no podía atenderme x que tenían que limpiarlo x derrame de combustible. Perdí mi turno no me atendieron y no se ocuparon de solucionar el error ni disculpas me dieron . me fui sin cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service at the pumps. After waiting in line, they directed me to another pump that couldn't serve me because they had to clean it due to a fuel spill. I missed my turn. They didn't serve me, didn't bother fixing the mistake, and didn't even apologize. I left without filling up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dmVuc3VBRRAB
